artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for Phases 4-5A of per-construction strictness approach
Blocker analysis for Phase 5B - fundamental mathematical limitation identified
Updated phase markers to [BLOCKED] with detailed analysis

partial_progress.details: Phase 5B blocked on fundamental mathematical limitation: cannot prove per-construction strictness without fresh atom existence, which is unprovable for pathological MCS. See summary 09 for full analysis.

verification.notes: Build passes. Axiom canonicalR_irreflexive_axiom remains (cannot be deleted while call sites depend on it). Sorry count at baseline level.

review_reason: Phases 5B-6 are fundamentally BLOCKED due to mathematical limitation (fresh atom existence unprovable). Options: (A) add semantic axiom excluding pathological MCS, (B) major refactoring for seed tracking, (C) accept limitation and keep deprecated axiom.

blocker.description: Per-construction strictness requires finding a distinguishing formula for each witness construction. For seriality-based constructions (NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder), no such formula exists. Fresh atom existence is unprovable (pathological MCS covers all atoms).

resolution_options.name: Seed tracking
resolution_options.description: Thread finite seed information through MCS construction
